---
title: "Auction Theory Deep Dive"
description: "Revenue equivalence, Myerson optimal, combinatorial, GSP, empirical auction methods."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
68 TUTORIALS
:::

# Auction Theory Deep Dive

Revenue equivalence, Myerson optimal, combinatorial, GSP, empirical auction methods.
